findings.description: Source has 5 h2-level sections (用途, 特徴, 要求, 使用方法, 拡張例) but the knowledge file has only 4 sections (s1–s4). The 要求 section — a standalone h2 with 8 specification bullet points — was merged into s2 (特徴) rather than given its own section.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2 headings separated by '----': 用途, 特徴, 要求, 使用方法, 拡張例 (five total). Knowledge file defines s1=用途, s2=特徴+要求 merged, s3=使用方法, s4=拡張例.

findings.description: Section s4 code examples reference several PascalCase class names not present in hints: Handler, HttpRequest, HttpResponse, ExecutionContext.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in 拡張例: 'public class HttpIncomingSimulateAction implements Handler<HttpRequest, HttpResponse>', 'public HttpResponse handle(HttpRequest request, ExecutionContext context)'
